<content>
1: :root {
2:   --bg: #f6f3ee;
3:   --surface: #fffdf9;
4:   --surface-strong: #ffffff;
5:   --text: #202020;
6:   --muted: #66605a;
7:   --brand: #c24f2c;
8:   --brand-dark: #9d3f23;
9:   --line: #e7e0d8;
10:   --shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(56, 38, 22, 0.12);
11: }
12: 
13: * {
14:   box-sizing: border-box;
15: }
16: 
17: html,
18: body {
19:   margin: 0;
20:   padding: 0;
21: }
22: 
23: body {
24:   font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
25:   color: var(--text);
26:   background: radial-gradient(circle at 10% 0%, #fff 0%, var(--bg) 55%);
27:   line-height: 1.5;
28: }
29: 
30: a {
31:   color: inherit;
32: }
33: 
34: .topbar {
35:   position: sticky;
36:   top: 0;
37:   z-index: 20;
38:   display: flex;
39:   align-items: center;
40:   justify-content: space-between;
41:   gap: 1rem;
42:   padding: 1rem 6vw;
43:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
44:   background: rgba(246, 243, 238, 0.92);
45:   backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
46: }
47: 
48: .brand {
49:   font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
50:   font-size: 1.2rem;
51:   font-weight: 700;
52:   text-decoration: none;
53: }
54: 
55: .menu {
56:   display: flex;
57:   gap: 1rem;
58: }
59: 
60: .menu a {
61:   color: var(--muted);
62:   text-decoration: none;
63: }
64: 
65: .cta,
66: .button {
67:   display: inline-flex;
68:   align-items: center;
69:   justify-content: center;
70:   border-radius: 999px;
71:   border: 1px solid transparent;
72:   text-decoration: none;
73:   transition: all 180ms ease;
74: }
75: 
76: .cta,
77: .button.primary {
78:   background: var(--brand);
79:   color: #fff;
80: }
81: 
82: .cta {
83:   padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
84:   font-weight: 500;
85: }
86: 
87: .cta:hover,
88: .button.primary:hover {
89:   background: var(--brand-dark);
90: }
91: 
92: main {
93:   width: min(1100px, 92vw);
94:   margin: 2rem auto 4rem;
95: }
96: 
97: .hero {
98:   display: grid;
99:   grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 0.9fr;
100:   gap: 1.5rem;
101:   margin-bottom: 2rem;
102: }
103: 
104: .hero-copy,
105: .hero-card {
106:   background: var(--surface);
107:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
108:   border-radius: 24px;
109:   padding: clamp(1.3rem, 3vw, 2rem);
110:   box-shadow: var(--shadow);
111: }
112: 
113: .eyebrow {
114:   color: var(--brand-dark);
115:   font-weight: 700;
116:   letter-spacing: 0.05em;
117:   text-transform: uppercase;
118:   font-size: 0.75rem;
119: }
120: 
121: h1,
122: h2,
123: h3 {
124:   font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
125:   line-height: 1.2;
126:   margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
127: }
128: 
129: h1 {
130:   font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
131:   max-width: 18ch;
132: }
133: 
134: .hero-actions {
135:   display: flex;
136:   flex-wrap: wrap;
137:   gap: 0.7rem;
138:   margin-top: 1.3rem;
139: }
140: 
141: .button {
142:   padding: 0.7rem 1.2rem;
143:   font-weight: 600;
144: }
145: 
146: .button.secondary {
147:   border-color: var(--line);
148:   background: var(--surface-strong);
149: }
150: 
151: .button.block {
152:   width: 100%;
153:   margin-top: 0.5rem;
154: }
155: 
156: .hero-card .rating {
157:   margin-top: 0;
158:   font-weight: 700;
159:   color: var(--brand-dark);
160: }
161: 
162: .hero-card ul {
163:   padding-left: 1.2rem;
164:   color: var(--muted);
165: }
166: 
167: .cards {
168:   display: grid;
169:   gap: 1rem;
170:   grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
171:   margin-bottom: 2rem;
172: }
173: 
174: .cards article,
175: .section {
176:   border-radius: 18px;
177:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
178:   background: var(--surface-strong);
179:   padding: 1.2rem;
180: }
181: 
182: .section {
183:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
184: }
185: 
186: .feature-grid {
187:   display: grid;
188:   gap: 0.8rem;
189:   grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
190: }
191: 
192: .feature-grid div {
193:   display: flex;
194:   flex-direction: column;
195:   gap: 0.2rem;
196:   padding: 0.8rem;
197:   border-radius: 12px;
198:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
199: }
200: 
201: .feature-grid span {
202:   color: var(--muted);
203: }
204: 
205: .split {
206:   display: grid;
207:   grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr;
208:   gap: 1rem;
209: }
210: 
211: .checklist {
212:   padding-left: 1.1rem;
213: }
214: 
215: .map-placeholder {
216:   border-radius: 14px;
217:   border: 1px dashed #c8b9a8;
218:   background: linear-gradient(140deg, #fff, #f2e8db);
219:   display: grid;
220:   place-content: center;
221:   min-height: 220px;
222:   text-align: center;
223:   color: var(--muted);
224: }
225: 
226: .contact a {
227:   color: var(--brand-dark);
228:   font-weight: 700;
229: }
230: 
231: footer {
232:   text-align: center;
233:   padding: 1.5rem;
234:   color: var(--muted);
235: }
236: 
237: @media (max-width: 900px) {
238:   .hero,
239:   .cards,
240:   .split,
241:   .feature-grid {
242:     grid-template-columns: 1fr;
243:   }
244: 
245:   .topbar {
246:     flex-wrap: wrap;
247:     justify-content: center;
248:   }
249: 
250:   .menu {
251:     width: 100%;
252:     justify-content: center;
253:     order: 3;
254:   }
255: 
256:   .cta {
257:     width: 100%;
258:   }
259: }
